CourseName: Implementing MOUD: Pain Management, Opioid Use, and Addiction in Alaska
Teachers: Bekah Meyer, Dustin Muse, Aaron Walbrecher
Teachers2: Meyer, Bekah; Muse, Dustin; Walbrecher, Aaron
PublicNotes: This self-paced online training equips healthcare providers with comprehensive, evidence-based knowledge and skills to deliver compassionate, inclusive care for individuals with Opioid Use Disorder (OUD) while effectively managing related pain. The course covers opioid pharmacology, pain management principles, Medications for Opioid Use Disorder (MOUD), ethical care, stigma reduction, and coordinated recovery support through interactive lessons featuring clinical scenarios, knowledge checks, and reflective prompts.
Description: Part 1 of 3 with a focus on MOUD
